channel.title: INtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How 1,000+ customer calls shaped a breakout enterprise AI startup
item.description: On this episode of Build Mode, David Park joins Isabelle Johannessen to discuss how he and his team are intentionally iterating, fundraising, and scal...

item.title: Best Gravel Running Shoes (2026): Salomon, Adidas, Nike
item.description: The best new shoes in this hybrid, niche footwear style can take you from your front door, down the asphalt, and into the trees.

item.title: Meta will allow rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp in Europe, but for a fee
item.description: Meta will allow rival AI chatbot providers to offer their services on WhatsApp for a fee, which ranges from â¬0.0490 to â¬0.1323 per "non-template messa...

item.title: KEF Muo Bluetooth Speaker: Portable Hi-Fi
item.description: Is a $250 Bluetooth speaker worth it? If it's this one made by KEF, it just might be.

item.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
item.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

item.title: Rivian is betting its future on one of the fastest EV launches in US history
item.description: If Rivian reaches its R2 sales target in 2026, it will be one of the fastest ramp-ups ever of a new EV in the United States.

item.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
item.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

item.title: Suunto Vertical 2 Review: Catching Up to the Pack
item.description: Suunto's latest adventure fitness tracker finally introduces a bright AMOLED screen that's great for maps.

item.title: Nothing Has 2 New Midrange Phones, but Only 1 Will Be Sold in the US
item.description: Nothing won't launch a flagship phone this year, but the colorful and affordable Phone (4a), Phone (4a) Pro, and Headphone (a) are here to fill the vo...

item.title: Best Workout Headphones (2026), Tested in the Gym and in the Streets
item.description: Rock your inner jock with a pair of sturdy, sweatproof, and tangle-proof headphones. Here are our favorites.
